targetDescription.zh: 面向自有本地仓库的 CI/CD 静态审计工具卡，覆盖触发器、非可信表达式、令牌权限、Action 固定版本与构建摘要。
targetDescription.en: A static CI/CD audit card for owned local repositories covering triggers, untrusted expressions, token permissions, immutable action references, and build digests.

commands.command:
workflow_dir=.github/workflows
if [ -d "$workflow_dir" ]; then
  find "$workflow_dir" -type f \( -name '*.yml' -o -name '*.yaml' \) -print
fi

description.zh: 仅在当前仓库列出 GitHub Actions YAML 文件，为后续触发器、权限和依赖审计建立固定输入清单。
description.en: List GitHub Actions YAML files only in the current repository to establish a fixed input inventory for trigger, permission, and dependency review.

name.zh: 检查高权限触发器与 Checkout

commands.command:
git grep -nE 'pull_request_target|github\.event\.pull_request\.head\.(sha|ref)' -- .github/workflows || true
git grep -nE 'persist-credentials:[[:space:]]*true|permissions:[[:space:]]*write-all' -- .github/workflows || true

description.zh: 定位 pull_request_target、Fork Head Checkout、凭据持久化和 write-all 权限，再人工确认是否形成非可信代码进入高权限上下文的数据流。
description.en: Locate pull_request_target, fork-head checkouts, persisted credentials, and write-all permissions, then manually determine whether untrusted code reaches a privileged context.

name.zh: 检查事件表达式进入 Shell

commands.command:
git grep -nE 'run:.*\$\{\{[^}]*github\.event\.' -- .github/workflows || true
find .github/workflows -type f \( -name '*.yml' -o -name '*.yaml' \) -exec actionlint {} +

description.zh: 先查找 run 中直接插值的 github.event 字段，再由 actionlint 解析每个工作流；命中只作为人工数据流复核入口。
description.en: Find github.event fields interpolated directly into run blocks and parse each workflow with actionlint; matches are review entry points rather than automatic findings.

commands.command:
mkdir -p artifacts
for dir in dist build; do
  if [ -d "$dir" ]; then
    find "$dir" -type f -print0 | sort -z | xargs -0 sha256sum
  fi
done > artifacts/build.sha256

description.zh: 对当前 dist 或 build 目录按稳定顺序生成 SHA-256 清单，用于比较同一提交的重复构建，不改写任何产物。
description.en: Generate a stable SHA-256 manifest for current dist or build directories to compare repeated builds of one commit without modifying artifacts.

name.zh: 检查 Action 固定版本与显式权限
name.en: Check Action Pinning and Explicit Permissions

commands.command:
git grep -nE 'uses:[[:space:]]+[^#[:space:]]+@(main|master|v[0-9]+)' -- .github/workflows || true
git grep -nE 'workflow_dispatch:|permissions:' -- .github/workflows || true

description.zh: 列出使用可变分支或主版本 Tag 的 Action，并并列显示手动触发器和 permissions 声明，供逐文件核对完整提交 SHA 与最小权限。
description.en: List actions referenced by mutable branches or major-version tags together with manual triggers and permission declarations for full-SHA and least-privilege review.

targetDescription.zh: 使用本地 Manifest、项目 Registry 配置、回环 Registry 与锁文件证据审计 npm 依赖来源和 Scope 解析边界。
targetDescription.en: Audit npm dependency origins and scope-resolution boundaries using local manifests, project registry configuration, a loopback registry, and lockfile evidence.

name.zh: 导出声明依赖与锁文件摘要
name.en: Export Declared Dependencies and Lockfile Summary

commands.command:
mkdir -p artifacts
node -e "const fs=require('fs');const p=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('package.json','utf8'));console.log(JSON.stringify({dependencies:p.dependencies||{},devDependencies:p.devDependencies||{}},null,2))" > artifacts/declared-dependencies.json
node -e "const fs=require('fs');const p=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('package-lock.json','utf8'));console.log(JSON.stringify({lockfileVersion:p.lockfileVersion,packages:Object.keys(p.packages||{}).length},null,2))"

description.zh: 从当前项目读取声明依赖并记录锁文件版本与条目数，输出到本地 artifacts，不访问远端仓库或第三方源码。
description.en: Read declared dependencies and record the lockfile version and package count from the current project into local artifacts without accessing remote repositories or third-party source.

name.zh: 读取 npm Registry 边界配置

commands.command:
npm config get registry
npm config get @payloader-lab:registry
npm config get replace-registry-host

description.zh: 读取默认 Registry、合成 Scope 映射和锁文件 Registry 主机替换策略，不打印认证令牌或完整用户配置。
description.en: Read the default registry, synthetic-scope mapping, and lockfile registry-host replacement policy without printing authentication tokens or full user configuration.

name.zh: 查询回环 Registry 合成包
name.en: Query a Synthetic Package on the Loopback Registry

commands.command:
npm view @payloader-lab/internal-utils versions --registry http://127.0.0.1:4873 --json
npm view @payloader-lab/internal-utils dist-tags --registry http://127.0.0.1:4873 --json

description.zh: 只向 127.0.0.1:4873 查询合成 Scope 包的版本与 dist-tag，用于建立无公共发布和无真实命名空间的解析夹具。
description.en: Query versions and dist-tags for a synthetic scoped package only from 127.0.0.1:4873 to establish a fixture without public publishing or real namespaces.

name.zh: 生成无脚本解析锁文件

commands.command:
work_dir=$(mktemp -d)
trap 'rm -r -- "$work_dir"' EXIT
cd "$work_dir"
npm init -y >/dev/null
npm install @payloader-lab/internal-utils@1.0.0 --registry http://127.0.0.1:4873 --package-lock-only --ignore-scripts
node -e "const p=require('./package-lock.json');const x=p.packages['node_modules/@payloader-lab/internal-utils'];console.log(JSON.stringify({version:x.version,resolved:x.resolved,integrity:x.integrity},null,2))"

description.zh: 在 mktemp 创建的一次性目录中仅生成锁文件并输出合成包的版本、来源和完整性；--ignore-scripts 阻止生命周期脚本执行。
description.en: Generate only a lockfile in a mktemp directory and print the synthetic package version, origin, and integrity while --ignore-scripts prevents lifecycle execution.

description.zh: 把当前锁文件中的包路径、版本、resolved 与 integrity 导出为 TSV，便于对照批准 Registry 主机和完整性策略。
description.en: Export package paths, versions, resolved URLs, and integrity values from the current lockfile as TSV for comparison with approved registry hosts and integrity policy.

targetName.zh: 包身份与生命周期脚本审计

targetDescription.zh: 对本地依赖清单、批准包名、离线 Tarball 和 npm 生命周期脚本执行静态审计，不搜索可注册名称、不发布包也不运行 Hook。
targetDescription.en: Statically audit local dependency inventories, approved package names, offline tarballs, and npm lifecycle scripts without searching available names, publishing packages, or running hooks.

name.zh: 导出本地 npm 依赖名

description.zh: 从当前 package.json 导出正式与开发依赖名并排序保存，不查询远端下载量、搜索结果或可注册名称。
description.en: Export and sort runtime and development dependency names from the current package.json without querying remote download counts, search results, or available names.

name.zh: 比较批准包名规范化结果

commands.command: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const read=f=>fs.readFileSync(f,'utf8').split(/\r?\n/).map(x=>x.trim()).filter(Boolean);const approved=read('policy/approved-packages.txt');const observed=read('artifacts/npm-dependency-names.txt');const norm=s=>s.toLowerCase().replace(/[-_.]/g,'');for(const name of observed){for(const expected of approved){if(name!==expected&&norm(name)===norm(expected))console.log(name+'\t'+expected)}}"

description.zh: 把当前依赖与批准清单按大小写和常见分隔符规范化后比较，只输出需要人工复核的名称对，不生成仿冒候选。
description.en: Compare current dependencies with an approved inventory after normalizing case and common separators, outputting only pairs that require manual review rather than generating lookalike candidates.

name.en: Statically Inspect an Offline Package Tarball

description.zh: 从离线 Tarball 读取 package.json 的身份、脚本与 bin 字段并列出归档成员，不解包到工作区也不执行包代码。
description.en: Read identity, script, and bin fields from package.json and list archive members in an offline tarball without extracting it into the workspace or executing package code.

name.zh: 无脚本安装预演与锁文件审计
name.en: Script-Free Install Dry Run and Lockfile Audit

commands.command:
mkdir -p artifacts
npm ci --ignore-scripts --dry-run
npm audit --package-lock-only --json > artifacts/npm-audit.json

description.zh: 使用锁文件执行 --ignore-scripts 预演，并把依赖审计结果写入本地 JSON；该流程不加载依赖模块或执行生命周期脚本。
description.en: Run a lockfile-based --ignore-scripts dry run and write dependency audit results to local JSON without loading modules or executing lifecycle scripts.

name.zh: 检查生命周期脚本策略

description.zh: 读取当前 ignore-scripts 策略并静态定位仓库内 package.json 的安装生命周期 Hook，供代码所有者逐项审批。
description.en: Read the current ignore-scripts policy and statically locate install lifecycle hooks in repository package.json files for owner review.
